aboutSubtitle: Turning everyday moments into lasting memories with the power of AI.
missionText: We believe every photo tells a story. KeepSqueak uses artificial intelligence to transform your cherished photos into beautifully designed memory books, complete with warm narratives, thoughtful layouts, and emotional storytelling. Whether it's a family trip, a love story, or everyday moments — we help you preserve them forever.
valueCreativityDesc: We push the boundaries of AI to create unique, personalized stories that capture the emotion behind every photo.
valuePrivacyDesc: Your photos and stories are yours. We never share, sell, or use your data for anything other than creating your memory books.
valueAccessibilityDesc: Beautiful memory books should be available to everyone. We offer free credits and affordable plans for all.
storyText: KeepSqueak was born from a simple idea: what if AI could help us tell the stories behind our photos? We started as a small project and grew into a platform that helps thousands of people turn their favorite moments into beautiful, shareable memory books. Every book we create is a unique piece of art, crafted by AI with love.
contactSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contactSuccessDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.
myBooksSubtitle: All your saved memory books in one place.
myBooksEmpty: You haven't created any books yet.
myBooksDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this book? This action cannot be undone.
privacySubtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Here's how we handle your data.
privacyInfoCollectedText: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and photos you upload to create memory books. We also collect usage data like pages visited, features used, and device information to improve our service.
privacyHowWeUseText: We use your information to create and deliver your memory books, process payments, send service-related communications, improve our AI models and user experience, and provide customer support. We never use your photos to train AI models without explicit consent.
privacyDataStorageText: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. Photos are processed temporarily to generate your memory books and are not retained beyond what is necessary. We use secure cloud infrastructure with regular security audits.
privacySharingText: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data with trusted service providers (payment processors, cloud hosting) who assist in operating our platform, subject to strict confidentiality agreements.
privacyCookiesText: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences. We use analytics cookies to understand how our service is used. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacyYourRightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can export your books and data, request account deletion, or opt out of marketing communications. Contact us to exercise any of these rights.
privacyChangesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and, where appropriate, sending you an email notification.
privacyContactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@keepsqueak.com or through our contact page.
termsSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using KeepSqueak.
termsAcceptanceText: By accessing or using KeepSqueak, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of any changes.
termsAccountRegistrationText: To use certain features, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must be at least 13 years old to create an account.
termsAcceptableUseText: You agree to use KeepSqueak only for lawful purposes. You may not upload content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, or violates the rights of others. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these terms and to suspend or terminate accounts that engage in prohibited activities.
termsIntellectualPropertyText: You retain ownership of all photos and content you upload. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of creating your memory books. The KeepSqueak platform, including its design, code, and AI models, remains our intellectual property.
termsPaymentsText: Paid features are billed as described at the time of purchase. Subscription plans auto-renew unless cancelled. We offer refunds within 7 days of purchase for unused credits. For subscriptions, you may cancel at any time and retain access until the end of your billing period.
termsTerminationText: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time through your profile settings. Upon termination, your data will be deleted in accordance with our privacy policy, though we may retain certain information as required by law.
termsLimitationText: KeepSqueak is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
termsGoverningLawText: These terms are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration, except where prohibited by law. You agree to resolve disputes individually, without class action proceedings.
termsContactText: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at legal@keepsqueak.com or through our contact page.
